descript.abstract: Presentation feature class that is a representation of the City's Street Network Database (SND) showing driveable public streets and other public walkways and trails, within the Seattle City limits.
descript.purpose: To display street and trail/walkway attributes maintained in SDOT's Hansen Asset Management system without relying on table joins or views.
descript.supplinf: This feature class is based on a join between the Transpo.Geobasid_Route features and SDOT's Hansen Asset Management Block view, MVW_GIS_BLOCK, which gathers street segment attribute data from a variety of asset tables. Arterial Classes are defined by the State of Washington. A sort by UNITIDSORT provides a a list of blocks by street name, then in geographical order of blocks along the street in the direction of addressing.

idinfo.datacred: Seattle Dept of Transportation, multiple Divisions.

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standards for Digital Geospatial Metadata

cntorgp.cntper: REQUIRED: The person responsible for the metadata information.
cntorgp.cntorg: REQUIRED: The organization responsible for the metadata information.

cntaddr.addrtype: REQUIRED: The mailing and/or physical address for the organization or individual.
cntaddr.city: REQUIRED: The city of the address.
cntaddr.state: REQUIRED: The state or province of the address.
cntaddr.postal: REQUIRED: The ZIP or other postal code of the address.

cntinfo.cntvoice: REQUIRED: The telephone number by which individuals can speak to the organization or individual.

altsys.altenc: Explicit elevation coordinate included with horizontal coordinates

attr.attrdef: Internal feature number.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Primary key of the Hansen street segment inventory table: COMPSEG
Component type code from the Hansen asset management system.
Street identifier from the Hansen asset management system; same as the Street Name identifier.
Street segment identifier from the Hansen asset management system; when combined with UNITID, uniquely describes a block.
Concatenation of UNITID and UNITID2 as a 20 char text field, to facilitate sorting. Provides a route-sorted list of blocks for any street.
Block description from the Hansen asset management system: "on street" between "low address cross street" and "high-address cross street".
Ordinance street name from the SND
On street name from Hansen Streets inventory
Cross street name at low-address end of block
Cross street name at high-address end of block
Arterial classification code: 5 = Interstate Freeway; 4 = State Highway; 3 = Collector Arterial; 2 = Minor Arterial; 1 = Principal Arterial; 0 = Not Designated (not an arterial)
Arterial classification description
Agency with primary maintenance responibility for the the Street Segment
Current operational status of the Segment
Address Block number of the Segment
Posted Speed limit, in MPH, for Arterial Streets
Digitized direction of Segment, by convention from the low-address to the high-address intersections
Flag for One Way streets, Yes or No
Direction of traffic flow for One Way streets
Traffic Flow code based on comparison of segment direction to one way direction; used for arrow symbology in the From or To
Segment length, in feet, from Hansen segment inventory
Surface width, in feet, of the constructed roadway
Primary surface pavement type

edom.edomvds: AC - Asphalt Flexible Pavement AC/AC- Asphalt Flexible Pavement with an Asphalt Overlay PCC – Concrete Rigid Pavement AC/PCC – Concrete Rigid Pavement, Brick Pavement, or Sheet Top Pavement with an Asphalt Overlay ST – Bituminous Surface Treatment (Chip Seal, etc) GRAVEL – Gravel Surface

attr.attrdef: Date of most recent primary Pavement Condition Index (PCI)
Secondary surface type, where one lane or a portion of the block differs from the rest
Date of most recent secondary Pavement Condition Index (PCI)
Low-address intersection description
Direction from Low-address intersection
Intersection compkey of Low-address or FROM intersection
High-adress intersection description
Direction from High-address intersection
Intersection compkey of High-address or TO intersection
State Plane X coordinate of segment mid-point
State Plane Y coordinate of segment mid-point
Feature geometry.

dataIdInfo.idAbs: Presentation feature class that is a representation of the City's Street Network Database (SND) showing driveable public streets and other public walkways and trails, within the Seattle City limits.
dataIdInfo.idPurp: To display street and trail/walkway attributes maintained in SDOT's Hansen Asset Management system without relying on table joins or views.
dataIdInfo.idCredit: Seattle Dept of Transportation, multiple Divisions.
dataIdInfo.suppInfo: This feature class is based on a join between the Transpo.Geobasid_Route features and SDOT's Hansen Asset Management Block view, MVW_GIS_BLOCK, which gathers street segment attribute data from a variety of asset tables. Arterial Classes are defined by the State of Washington. A sort by UNITIDSORT provides a a list of blocks by street name, then in geographical order of blocks along the street in the direction of addressing.
